maintain.name: Volt
maintain.note: Nature DoT for 18 sec that also slows and generates 2 Static per tick; keep it ticking on the target

procs.name: Lightning Cage
procs.when: on cooldown - generates 50 Static and, while caged, damaging spells generate 20 Static each

Lightning.st: Keep Volt up, then build Static with Forked Lightning and dump it with Call Lightning; use Storm Ascendance and Lightning Cage on cooldown for extra Static generation.
Lightning.aoe: Forked Lightning bounces to up to 4 enemies (generating 5 Static per hit) - lead with it, then spread damage while keeping Volt on the primary target.
Lightning.summary: Keep Volt up. ST: Forked Lightning -> Call Lightning. AoE: Forked Lightning -> Call Lightning.

maintain.name: Unshackle
maintain.note: Depletes 50 Static to transform your Air Elemental into a stronger form for 15 sec (+25% damage, +30% haste); re-empower it when the buff drops

procs.name: Skyfall
procs.when: off cooldown - depletes 40 Static to command your Air Elemental to strike for heavy damage

Wind.st: Build Static with Gale and spend it on Unshackle to keep your Air Elemental empowered, then dump extra Static into Skyfall; fill with the class Shock/Call Lightning.
Wind.aoe: Gale hits the target and up to 2 nearby enemies, so it already cleaves - keep spending Static on Skyfall and Unshackle.
Wind.summary: Keep the Air Elemental empowered via Unshackle. ST: Gale -> Skyfall. AoE: Gale cleaves.

maintain.name: Drown
maintain.note: 8 sec debuff (-20% healing) that ramps its detonation damage per Conductive stack you generate; keep it applied

maintain.name: Stormcloud
maintain.note: 15 sec debuff that adds 20% spell damage taken and periodically triggers Conductive; keep it up on the target

procs.name: Deluge
procs.when: when Conductive is stacked - consumes Conductive (and 50 Static) to trigger Conduction, which scales up 25% per stack consumed

Maelstrom.st: Keep Drown and Stormcloud up to build Conductive, spend it with Deluge, and channel Stormflow (Shock can be cast during it) to fill; use Stormfury on cooldown.
Maelstrom.aoe: Deluge and Stormfury are area spenders - apply Stormcloud, build Conductive, then dump with Deluge over the pack.
Maelstrom.summary: Keep Drown and Stormcloud up. ST: build Conductive -> Deluge / Stormflow. AoE: Deluge -> Stormfury.
